THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C &C OF S.F.,A MUNI CORP./BU.OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDIOLA, ROMEO MENDIOLA, SOCORRO $440.79 PRINCIPAL, $83.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $524.04, TERMS: $37.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING 9/25/89 & ON EVERY 25TH. OTHER: STIPULATION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
